nasb.text: He came to him, and behold, he was standing beside his burnt offering, and the leaders of Moab with him. And Balak said to him, “What has the Lord spoken?”

esv.text: And he came to him, and behold, he was standing beside his burnt offering, and the princes of Moab with him. And Balak said to him, “What has the Lord spoken?”

cnv.text: 巴蘭回到巴勒那裡，見他站在自己的燔祭旁邊，摩押的領袖也與他在那裡。巴勒問巴蘭：“耶和華說了甚麼話呢？”

ccb.text: 巴兰回到巴勒那里，看见他和摩押的臣仆们都站在燔祭旁边。巴勒问道：“耶和华说了什么？”
